name: Applesauce Granola Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together brown sugar, shortening, vanilla, and egg until well combined.
3. Stir in the applesauce.
4. Gradually stir in the remaining ingredients (flour, granola, baking soda, and salt) until fully incorporated.
5. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls about 2-inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 11 to 13 minutes or until almost no indentation remains when touched in the center.
7. Cool slightly on the cookie sheet, then remove and cool completely on a wire rack.
